title: Tutorial screen to QSG screen
scenario: Tutorial screen navigation to Quick Start Guide displays correct image and text per Figma design
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, locate and tap the Tutorial option.
3. On the Tutorial screen, find and tap the Quick Start Guide (QSG) option.
4. Observe the image and text displayed on the QSG screen.
expected: The QSG screen displays the correct image and text as specified in the Figma design.
